sourceReconciliation.result: All eight tagged commits are represented above. Pi hooks and dashboard/modal UX are the only product changes requiring Linux host adaptations; the remaining six commits are inherited documentation, site, screenshot, or release-note changes.

deepReviewFindings.finding: packaged Ghostty resources and safe TERM fallback
deepReviewFindings.validation: Pinned theme count and known files, shell integration, and xterm-ghostty are checked in cache, staging, all package formats, and CI.

deepReviewFindings.finding: length-delimited URLs and libghostty C-string lifetimes
deepReviewFindings.validation: Sentinel, invalid UTF-8, partial allocation, repeated release, real command/overlay/cwd/restore buffers, the real libghostty URL action boundary, exact registered desktop-launch URI, and every borrowed callback buffer passed.

deepReviewFindings.finding: per-window GTK callbacks and delayed work
deepReviewFindings.validation: Owner generation, timer cancellation, background-window callbacks, and repeated secondary-window teardown passed.

deepReviewFindings.finding: notification focus ordering, pane identity, and closed-window reveal
deepReviewFindings.validation: Focused OSC suppression precedes unseen increments; explicit control notifications bypass suppression; encoded windows and panes reopen safely.

deepReviewFindings.finding: custom-command spawn and asynchronous failure routing
deepReviewFindings.validation: Missing executable, invalid cwd, exit status, environment, pane origins, null stdio, close, and close/reopen generations passed.

deepReviewFindings.finding: Linux CLI parser and formatter drift
deepReviewFindings.validation: Linux consumes the shared public catalog; theme slots, synchronized rendering, affected output, help, socket precedence, and integration extension passed.

deepReviewFindings.finding: Swift 6 GTK compile mode and real UI CI
deepReviewFindings.validation: Strict Swift 6 compilation and all isolated GTK accessibility scenarios passed locally and are required in branch and release CI.
The patch is clean and both branch and release CI reject future whitespace errors.

portablePackageSeams.purpose: Expose the existing shared command catalog so a host can append commands without copying the parser.

downstreamAudit.result: No Linux UI, process, packaging, GTK, Glibc, or libghostty dependency entered agtermCore. The remaining downstream files are accumulated Linux-port ownership, synchronized product/control documentation, or fork maintenance configuration.

sharedDocumentationVerification.v0.14.0README: Contains Pi hook installation and dashboard single-click behavior.
sharedDocumentationVerification.v0.14.0Site: site/docs.html and site/index.html contain Pi and dashboard product updates, including the dashboard screenshot asset.
sharedDocumentationVerification.linuxSiteDisposition: Inherited site product content is retained; only the already-published Linux command/platform notes in site/docs.html differ downstream.
